name: python3-acstore
title: python3-acstore
summary: implementation to read and write Attribute Container stores (Python 3)
description:
implementation to read and write Attribute Container stores (Python 3)
ACStore, or Attribute Container Storage, provides a stand-alone implementation
to read and write Attribute Container stores, such as Plaso storage files.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
